SQLScript:
WITH EligibleMemberData AS(
SELECT DISTINCT   
    COALESCE(nullif(mpb.UniquePersonKey,'None'),nullif(mpb.PlanMemberID,'None')) AS MemberID
  ,COALESCE(nullif(ompb.UniquePersonKey,'None'),nullif(ompb.PlanMemberID,'None')) AS OriginalMemberID
FROM MemberPersonBridge mpb
  INNER JOIN HedisEligibleMember hem
    ON mpb.BISInternalPersonId = hem.BISInternalPersonId
  LEFT JOIN MemberPersonBridge ompb
    ON ompb.BISInternalPersonId = hem.BISInternalPersonId
    AND ompb.IsOriginalMemberId = 1
)
,KeyWMaxFileID AS (
SELECT ClaimNumber
	,ClaimLineNumber
	,IfNUll(PlanMemberID, UniquePersonKey) AS MemberID
	,LineServiceFromDate AS DateOfService
	,MAX(FileID) AS MaxFileID
FROM EMRMedicalClaim
GROUP BY ClaimNumber
	,ClaimLineNumber
	,IfNUll(PlanMemberID, UniquePersonKey)
	,LineServiceFromDate
)
,ProviderLookup AS (
SELECT 
   ProviderID
  ,NPI
  ,FileID
  ,Rank
FROM(
		SELECT DISTINCT ProviderID
				,NPI
				,FileID
				,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NPI ORDER BY FileID DESC,ProviderID DESC) as Rank
		FROM Provider p) A
WHERE A.Rank=1
),
FinalEMRVisit AS(
SELECT DISTINCT emd.OriginalMemberID AS MemberID
	,date_format(mx.DateOfService,'yyyyMMdd') AS DateOfService
	,'' AS AdmissionDate
	,'' AS DischargeDate
	,mmc.CPTCode AS CPT
	,mmc.CPTModifier1
	,mmc.CPTModifier2
	,CASE RIGHT(mmc.CPTCode,1) WHEN 'F' THEN CPTCode ELSE '' END AS CPTII
	,CASE RIGHT(mmc.CPTCode,1) WHEN 'F' THEN CPTModifier1 ELSE '' END AS CPTIIModifier
	,mmc.HCPCSCode AS HCPCSCDT
	,mmc.DiagCode1 AS PrincipalICDDiagnosis
	,mmc.DiagCode2 AS ICDDiagnosis2
	,mmc.DiagCode3 AS ICDDiagnosis3
	,mmc.DiagCode4 AS ICDDiagnosis4
	,mmc.DiagCode5 AS ICDDiagnosis5
	,mmc.DiagCode6 AS ICDDiagnosis6
	,mmc.DiagCode7 AS ICDDiagnosis7
	,mmc.DiagCode8 AS ICDDiagnosis8
	,mmc.DiagCode9 AS ICDDiagnosis9
	,mmc.DiagCode10 AS ICDDiagnosis10
	,mmc.DiagCode11 AS ICDDiagnosis11
	,mmc.DiagCode12 AS ICDDiagnosis12
	,mmc.DiagCode13 AS ICDDiagnosis13
	,mmc.DiagCode14 AS ICDDiagnosis14
	,mmc.DiagCode15 AS ICDDiagnosis15
	,mmc.DiagCode16 AS ICDDiagnosis16
	,mmc.DiagCode17 AS ICDDiagnosis17
	,mmc.DiagCode18 AS ICDDiagnosis18
	,mmc.DiagCode19 AS ICDDiagnosis19
	,mmc.DiagCode20 AS ICDDiagnosis20
	,mmc.ProcCode1 AS PrincipalICDProcedure
	,mmc.ProcCode2 AS ICDProcedure2
	,mmc.ProcCode3 AS ICDProcedure3
	,mmc.ProcCode4 AS ICDProcedure4
	,mmc.ProcCode5 AS ICDProcedure5
	,mmc.ProcCode6 AS ICDProcedure6
	,mmc.ICDVersion AS ICDIdentifier
	,mmc.DischargeStatusCode AS DischargeStatus
	,mmc.RevenueCode AS UBRevenue
	,mmc.BillTypeCode AS UBTypeOfBill
	,mmc.PlaceOfService AS CMSPlaceOfService
	,CASE UPPER(mmc.ClaimStatus) 
	  WHEN 'I' THEN 1
	  WHEN 'D' THEN 2
	  WHEN 'A' THEN 3
	  WHEN 'P' THEN 3
	  WHEN 'R' THEN 4
	  END AS ClaimStatus
	,CASE 
	  WHEN UPPER(IfNULL(mmc.RenderingProviderID,'')) LIKE 'NPI-%' THEN IfNUll(rpl.ProviderID,mmc.RenderingProviderID)
	  WHEN UPPER(IfNULL(mmc.RenderingProviderID,'NPI-')) NOT LIKE 'NPI-%' THEN mmc.RenderingProviderID
	  WHEN IfNULL(mmc.RenderingProviderID,'') = '' AND UPPER(IfNULL(mmc.BillingProviderID,'')) LIKE 'NPI-%' THEN IfNUll(bpl.ProviderID,mmc.BillingProviderID)
	  WHEN IfNULL(mmc.RenderingProviderID,'') = '' AND UPPER(IfNULL(mmc.BillingProviderID,'NPI-')) NOT LIKE 'NPI-%' THEN mmc.BillingProviderID
	  WHEN IfNULL(mmc.RenderingProviderID,'') = '' AND IfNULL(mmc.BillingProviderID,'') = '' THEN '00000000'
	  ELSE '00000000'
	  END AS ProviderID
	,'Y' AS SupplementalDataFlag
	,mmc.ClaimNumber AS ClaimID
	,CAST(mmc.ClaimLineNumber AS int) AS ClaimLineID
	,mmc.SourceName AS DataSourceName
	,'' AS AdditionalColumn1
	,'' AS AdditionalColumn2
	,'' AS AdditionalColumn3
	,'' AS AdditionalColumn4
	,'' AS AdditionalColumn5
	,'' AS Filler
	,current_timestamp() AS LoadDateTime
  ,CASE
    WHEN UPPER(IfNULL(mmc.RenderingProviderID,'')) LIKE 'NPI-%' THEN IfNUll(rpl.ProviderID,mmc.RenderingProviderID)
    WHEN UPPER(IfNULL(mmc.RenderingProviderID,'NPI-')) NOT LIKE 'NPI-%' THEN mmc.RenderingProviderID
    WHEN IfNULL(mmc.RenderingProviderID,'') = '' THEN '00000000'
    ELSE '00000000'
    END AS RenderingProviderID
  ,'00000000' as ServicingProviderID
 ,CASE
    WHEN UPPER(IfNULL(mmc.BillingProviderID,'')) LIKE 'NPI-%' THEN IfNUll(bpl.ProviderID,mmc.BillingProviderID)
    WHEN UPPER(IfNULL(mmc.BillingProviderID,'NPI-')) NOT LIKE 'NPI-%' THEN mmc.BillingProviderID
    WHEN IfNULL(mmc.BillingProviderID,'') = '' THEN '00000000'
    ELSE '00000000'
    END AS BillingProviderID
  ,mmc.DiagCode21 AS ICDDiagnosis21
  ,mmc.DiagCode22 AS ICDDiagnosis22
  ,mmc.DiagCode23 AS ICDDiagnosis23
  ,mmc.DiagCode24 AS ICDDiagnosis24
  ,mmc.DiagCode25 AS ICDDiagnosis25
  ,mmc.DiagCode26 AS ICDDiagnosis26
  ,mmc.DiagCode27 AS ICDDiagnosis27
  ,mmc.DiagCode28 AS ICDDiagnosis28
  ,mmc.DiagCode29 AS ICDDiagnosis29
  ,mmc.DiagCode30 AS ICDDiagnosis30
  ,mmc.DiagCode31 AS ICDDiagnosis31
  ,mmc.DiagCode32 AS ICDDiagnosis32
  ,mmc.DiagCode33 AS ICDDiagnosis33
  ,mmc.DiagCode34 AS ICDDiagnosis34
  ,mmc.DiagCode35 AS ICDDiagnosis35
  ,mmc.DiagCode36 AS ICDDiagnosis36
  ,mmc.DiagCode37 AS ICDDiagnosis37
  ,mmc.DiagCode38 AS ICDDiagnosis38
  ,mmc.ProcCode7 AS ICDProcedure7
  ,mmc.ProcCode8 AS ICDProcedure8
  ,mmc.ProcCode9 AS ICDProcedure9
  ,mmc.ProcCode10 AS ICDProcedure10
  ,mmc.ProcCode11 AS ICDProcedure11
  ,mmc.ProcCode12 AS ICDProcedure12
  ,mmc.ProcCode13 AS ICDProcedure13
  ,mmc.ProcCode14 AS ICDProcedure14
  ,mmc.ProcCode15 AS ICDProcedure15
  ,mmc.ProcCode16 AS ICDProcedure16
  ,mmc.ProcCode17 AS ICDProcedure17
  ,mmc.ProcCode18 AS ICDProcedure18
  ,mmc.ProcCode19 AS ICDProcedure19
  ,mmc.ProcCode20 AS ICDProcedure20
  ,mmc.ProcCode21 AS ICDProcedure21
  ,mmc.ProcCode22 AS ICDProcedure22
  ,mmc.ProcCode23 AS ICDProcedure23
  ,mmc.ProcCode24 AS ICDProcedure24
  ,mmc.ProcCode25 AS ICDProcedure25
  ,mmc.ProcCode26 AS ICDProcedure26
  ,mmc.ProcCode27 AS ICDProcedure27
  ,mmc.ProcCode28 AS ICDProcedure28
  ,mmc.ProcCode29 AS ICDProcedure29
  ,mmc.ProcCode30 AS ICDProcedure30
  ,mmc.ProcCode31 AS ICDProcedure31
  ,mmc.ProcCode32 AS ICDProcedure32
  ,mmc.ProcCode33 AS ICDProcedure33
  ,mmc.ProcCode34 AS ICDProcedure34
  ,mmc.ProcCode35 AS ICDProcedure35
  ,mmc.ProcCode36 AS ICDProcedure36
  ,mmc.ProcCode37 AS ICDProcedure37
  ,mmc.ProcCode38 AS ICDProcedure38
FROM EMRMedicalClaim mmc
	INNER JOIN KeyWMaxFileID mx 
    ON IfNUll(mmc.PlanMemberID, mmc.UniquePersonKey) = mx.MemberID
      AND mmc.ClaimNumber = mx.ClaimNumber
      AND mmc.ClaimLineNumber = mx.ClaimLineNumber
      AND mmc.LineServiceFromDate = mx.DateOfService
      AND mmc.FileID = mx.MaxFileID
	INNER JOIN EligibleMemberData emd 
    ON mx.MemberID = emd.MemberID
	LEFT JOIN ProviderLookup rpl 
    ON REPLACE(UPPER(mmc.RenderingProviderID),'NPI-','') = UPPER(rpl.NPI)
	LEFT JOIN ProviderLookup bpl 
    ON REPLACE(UPPER(mmc.BillingProviderID),'NPI-','') = UPPER(bpl.NPI)
)
SELECT 
   MemberID
  ,DateOfService
  ,AdmissionDate
  ,DischargeDate
  ,CPT
  ,CPTModifier1
  ,CPTModifier2
  ,HCPCSCDT
  ,CPTII
  ,CPTIIModifier
  ,PrincipalICDDiagnosis
  ,ICDDiagnosis2
  ,ICDDiagnosis3
  ,ICDDiagnosis4
  ,ICDDiagnosis5
  ,ICDDiagnosis6
  ,ICDDiagnosis7
  ,ICDDiagnosis8
  ,ICDDiagnosis9
  ,ICDDiagnosis10
  ,ICDDiagnosis11
  ,ICDDiagnosis12
  ,ICDDiagnosis13
  ,ICDDiagnosis14
  ,ICDDiagnosis15
  ,ICDDiagnosis16
  ,ICDDiagnosis17
  ,ICDDiagnosis18
  ,ICDDiagnosis19
  ,ICDDiagnosis20
  ,PrincipalICDProcedure
  ,ICDProcedure2
  ,ICDProcedure3
  ,ICDProcedure4
  ,ICDProcedure5
  ,ICDProcedure6
  ,ICDIdentifier
  ,DischargeStatus
  ,UBRevenue
  ,UBTypeOfBill
  ,CMSPlaceOfService
  ,ClaimStatus
  ,ProviderID
  ,SupplementalDataFlag
  ,ClaimID
  ,ClaimLineID
  ,DataSourceName
  ,AdditionalColumn1
  ,AdditionalColumn2
  ,AdditionalColumn3
  ,AdditionalColumn4
  ,AdditionalColumn5
  ,Filler
  ,LoadDateTime
  ,RenderingProviderID
  ,ServicingProviderID
  ,BillingProviderID
  ,ICDDiagnosis21
  ,ICDDiagnosis22
  ,ICDDiagnosis23
  ,ICDDiagnosis24
  ,ICDDiagnosis25
  ,ICDDiagnosis26
  ,ICDDiagnosis27
  ,ICDDiagnosis28
  ,ICDDiagnosis29
  ,ICDDiagnosis30
  ,ICDDiagnosis31
  ,ICDDiagnosis32
  ,ICDDiagnosis33
  ,ICDDiagnosis34
  ,ICDDiagnosis35
  ,ICDDiagnosis36
  ,ICDDiagnosis37
  ,ICDDiagnosis38
  ,ICDProcedure7
  ,ICDProcedure8
  ,ICDProcedure9
  ,ICDProcedure10
  ,ICDProcedure11
  ,ICDProcedure12
  ,ICDProcedure13
  ,ICDProcedure14
  ,ICDProcedure15
  ,ICDProcedure16
  ,ICDProcedure17
  ,ICDProcedure18
  ,ICDProcedure19
  ,ICDProcedure20
  ,ICDProcedure21
  ,ICDProcedure22
  ,ICDProcedure23
  ,ICDProcedure24
  ,ICDProcedure25
  ,ICDProcedure26
  ,ICDProcedure27
  ,ICDProcedure28
  ,ICDProcedure29
  ,ICDProcedure30
  ,ICDProcedure31
  ,ICDProcedure32
  ,ICDProcedure33
  ,ICDProcedure34
  ,ICDProcedure35
  ,ICDProcedure36
  ,ICDProcedure37
  ,ICDProcedure38
FROM FinalEMRVisit
